User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the ZapSender platform.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user, matching the Firebase Auth UID.

company.description: The name of the user's company.

credits.description: The number of credits the user has available for sending messages.

creditsUsedToday.description: The number of credits the user has used today.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user account was created.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.description: Represents a contact in the user's address book.

id.description: The unique identifier for the contact.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this contact.

status.description: Determines the current validation status of the contact.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the contact was created.

Campaign.title: Campaign
Campaign.description: Represents a messaging campaign created by the user.

id.description: The unique identifier for the campaign.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this campaign.

status.description: The current status of the campaign.

failed.description: The number of messages that failed to send.

total.description: The total number of messages to send.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the campaign was created.

Instance.title: Instance
Instance.description: Represents a WhatsApp instance connected by the user.

id.description: The unique identifier for the instance.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this instance.

status.description: The current status of the instance.

provider.description: The provider used for this instance.

phone.description: The phone number associated with the instance.

battery.description: The battery level of the connected device (if applicable).

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the instance was created.

Template.title: Template
Template.description: Represents a message template created by the user to be approved by an admin.

id.description: The unique identifier for the template.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this template.

content.description: The message content of the template.

status.description: The approval status of the template.

rejectionReason.description: The reason for rejection if the status is REJECTED.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the template was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the template was last updated.

templates/{templateId}.description: Stores message templates. Each template belongs to a user (userId).

users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles. The document ID must match the Firebase Auth UID.

contacts/{contactId}.description: Stores contacts. Each contact belongs to a user (userId).

campaigns/{campaignId}.description: Stores campaigns. Each campaign belongs to a user (userId).

instances/{instanceId}.description: Stores WhatsApp instances. Each instance belongs to a user (userId).
